WHRules.GeneralRules1: Werewolf's Hunt is a 6-reel (4 rows in reels 1 and 6, 5 rows in reels 2, 3, 4 and 5) video slot featuring bonus feature with increasing prize amount.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{10000} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 3,600 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

WHRules.GeneralRules3: Bonus Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Bonus Feature.

WHCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
WHCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
WHCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
WHCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

WHMultiplierFeature.Title: Multiplier Symbol
WHMultiplierFeature.MultiplierExplaination1: During any main game spin, 1 or more Multiplier symbols with values ranging from x2 to x20 may appear on the reels.
WHMultiplierFeature.MultiplierExplaination2: At the end of the spin, all multipliers from the Multiplier symbol on the reels will be added together and the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier.

WHBonusSpinRules.Title: Bonus Feature
WHBonusSpinRules.BonusSpinExplaination1: 4 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Bonus Feature.
WHBonusSpinRules.SpecialSymbolExplaination1: During the Bonus Feature, only Prize Multiplier symbols, Blue Moon symbols, Red Moon symbols and Yellow Moon symbols will appear on the reels.
WHBonusSpinRules.SpecialSymbolExplaination2: At the start of the Bonus Feature, all Scatter symbols on the reels are transformed into Prize Multiplier symbols and will reveal a bet multiplication from 1x to 3x.
WHBonusSpinRules.SpecialSymbolExplaination3: At the start of the Bonus Feature, 3 bonus spins are awarded and every new Prize Multiplier symbol, Blue Moon symbol, Red Moon symbol and Yellow Moon symbol will reset the bonus spin counter back to 3.
WHBonusSpinRules.SpecialSymbolExplaination4: Prize Multiplier symbol is shown as a bet multiplication ranging from 1x to 3x.
WHBonusSpinRules.SpecialSymbolExplaination5: At any bonus spin, Blue Moon symbol, Red Moon symbol and/or Yellow Moon symbol may appear as partial moon and will take up to 5 bonus spins to transform into a full moon which activates their respective feature.
WHBonusSpinRules.SpecialSymbolExplaination6: After activating the features, the corresponding moon symbols will be in total darkness and will take 5 bonus spins to transform into a full moon again.
WHBonusSpinRules.AddExplaination1: When a Blue Moon symbol becomes a full moon, the Blue Moon symbol will add 1x to all symbols on the reels.
WHBonusSpinRules.AbsorbExplaination1: When a Red Moon symbol becomes a full moon, the Red Moon symbol will absorb all of symbols' values on the reels.
WHBonusSpinRules.DoubleExplaination1: When a Yellow Moon symbol becomes a full moon, the Yellow Moon symbol will double the values of 3 randomly selected symbols.
WHBonusSpinRules.BonusSpinExplaination2: The Bonus Feature ends when the bonus spin counter reaches zero.

WHFeatureBuy.FeatureBuyDesc: Tap on Start button to buy the Bonus Feature at the price displayed in the Feature Buy menu.

WHMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
WHMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
WHMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Bonus Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
